review_question: Is the financial algorithm recorded with owner, purpose, scope, status, and decision role?
Have conceptual soundness, data quality, implementation, backtesting, and limitations been reviewed?
Are explanations, adverse-action reasons, correction, appeal, and fair-access effects reviewed?
Are liquidity, market impact, feedback loops, and kill switches reviewed?
Are adverse scenarios, tail events, liquidity shocks, and model failure cases tested?
Can inputs, outputs, thresholds, overrides, decisions, changes, and incidents be reconstructed?
Can the system be paused, limited, rolled back, or retired when unsafe?
